title: thyrsanthema ovalis
intro: Thyrsanthema ovalis, also known as the woolly heads or woolly daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The health benefits of Thyrsanthema ovalis include its ability to act as a natural expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
